title: UT MD Anderson Presents Latest Cancer Research Breakthroughs at AACR Conference
detail: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center unveiled its latest cancer research breakthroughs at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) annual conference. The presentation included advances in personalized medicine, immunotherapy combinations, and novel therapeutic targets. MD Anderson researchers highlighted progress in multiple cancer types including breakthrough data on treatment resistance mechanisms and new approaches to overcome them.

media.caption: UT MD Anderson Cancer Center research presentation at AACR conference
